description: Sample-disk test manifest for Sprint 112 (TrueDrive core sync). Smoke scripts iterate this; each entry tested by Specs 142/143/144 in their respective scenarios. Mode is REQUIRED per entry (Q7 decision = B, no implicit default).

modes.truedrive-pure: Silicon-faithful TrueDrive. No traps, no rescue hooks. Default for V2 fastloader work.
modes.truedrive-rescue: TrueDrive + rescue hooks ($7C poke, reevaluateCa1Level, idle-skip). Debug only.
modes.trap-fast: V1 KERNAL/M-W/M-E trap mode. Fastest, least faithful.

loaderFamilies.kernel-real-serial: Standard KERNAL LOAD via real CIA2/IEC bit-bang. No game-specific fastloader.
loaderFamilies.kernel-trap: KERNAL LOAD shortcut via $F50A trap (V1 trap-fast mode only).
loaderFamilies.system3: System 3 family — custom fastloader at drive $0700 stage-2, 24-bit serial receive at $042F.
loaderFamilies.epyx: Epyx FastLoad — drive bit-bang via $1800 PB.
loaderFamilies.vorpal: Vorpal Loader (EA) — raw track GCR with custom encoding. Bards Tale, Ultima series.
loaderFamilies.ocean: Ocean Loader v1-7 — byte-bang with sync patterns.
loaderFamilies.byteboozer: ByteBoozer / Dreamload / Krill loader — modern crack/demo loader.
loaderFamilies.synthetic: Hand-crafted disk image for narrow regression.

expectedOutcomes.reaches_basic_ready: C64 reaches BASIC READY prompt after reset.
expectedOutcomes.accepts_input: Game accepts joystick or keyboard input on title.
expectedOutcomes.boots_to_first_room: Game advances past title into first playable scene.

entries.purpose: minimal synthetic baseline — no game logic, just one block.
V1 baseline regress — KERNAL trap path, must stay green throughout Sprint 112.
primary kernel-real-serial regress baseline. MM transfers 38658 bytes byte-perfect (Sprint 88+).
MM disk swap — exercises multi-disk LOAD.
PRIMARY BUG CASE. Drive samples wrong DATA bit during 24-bit receive at $042F-$044C. Sprint 111 root-cause investigation. Spec 138 probe target.
second System 3 sample — does motm fix generalize to its sibling loaders?
side B / disk swap for last ninja remix.

todoNotes: User to drop ~5 additional originals from archive: 1x Vorpal (Bards Tale or Ultima 4/5), 1x Ocean (Op Wolf or Robocop), 1x Rainbow Arts (Turrican or Mars Cops), 1x ByteBoozer/Krill (modern demo crack), 1x CodeMasters (Dizzy or similar).
